module.name: client
module.purpose: Client crate namespace for the marix_client library and client binaries. ClientEvent carries Common streaming output and Done completion events by signature id, and ClientSession now creates tasks with an empty TaskSignature.name while keeping the user request only in TaskEvent::Create.

childModules.name: app
childModules.purpose: Contains the placeholder marix-client-app binary entrypoint.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Contains the marix-client-cli command-line binary entrypoint, which accepts --interactive or --oneshot "request" and drains Common streaming output plus Done completion events so oneshot completion exits promptly. It also connects the telemetry Logger to config.telemetry.server_address before starting the session.
